description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sofa with a minimalist design, upholstered in a dark, solid-colored fabric. The sofa features two large seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all of which appear to be uniform in size and shape, providing a clean and symmetrical look. The armrests are straight, boxy, and padded, extending to the same height as the backrest for a cohesive silhouette. The sofa sits on four slender, exposed legs, likely made of metal, which elevate it slightly above the ground and contribute to its contemporary aesthetic. The upholstery appears smooth and matte, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching, emphasizing simplicity and functionality. This type of sofa would be well-suited for urban environments such as apartment lobbies, waiting areas, or modern living rooms.
description: A modern, dark-colored sofa with straight padded armrests, two large seat and back cushions, and slender metal legs. The design is minimalist, with smooth, matte upholstery and a clean, rectangular profile.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width, two seat and back cushions, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the boxy armrest, the depth of the seat, and the slim legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous backrest and the sofa's overall rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the other armrest and the sofa's depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, uniform seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all loose and symmetrically arranged.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy, padded armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a minimalist, unadorned profile.
attribute_leg_design: Four slender, exposed metal legs positioned at the corners, slightly elevating the sofa above the ground.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight, continuous backrest with two loose back cushions, matching the seat cushions in size and shape.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth, matte fabric with no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
